$comment: FC15 paste residuals end-to-end witness: (1) object-like `##` (MK3 -> add3, a function name reached by the parser only if the object-like paste product resolves), (2) placemarker (CAT(r1,) -> r1 via an EMPTY ## operand -- a missing placemarker makes `r1 ##` a dangling paste that FAILS TO COMPILE), (3) GNU comma-elision (LOG(r2) -> sink(r2), the comma before `## __VA_ARGS__` dropped because __VA_ARGS__ is empty -- without elision sink is called with two args and fails to compile). All three feed REAL non-inlined calls (add3/sink) so the result is not const-folded, and the `release` arm runs the shipped pipeline over the same source. add3(10,20,12)=42; r2=r1=42; sink(42)=42 -> exit 42.
